# xif_agent upstream provenance

- Repository: `https://github.com/BLANK2077/xif_agent.git`
- Commit: `64f4a6aacef0a19bbe3e7992e698e916a70588f1`
- Imported: `2026-07-19`

This directory contains the upstream XIF library and reusable self-test source.
Machine-specific analysis helpers and generated reports are intentionally
excluded. The separately installed `xif-agent` skill is not vendored into
xverif.
